note: the gabes daily signal feed. the homepage reads the entry dated today (falls back to the most recent on or before today). one weekday a day, mon-fri. nothing here ships unapproved.

signals.hook: your voice is now a password.
signals.line: thirty seconds of you on a podcast is enough to empty an account in your name.

signals.hook: “i thought you had it” is not a workflow.
signals.line: it is where revenue goes to die quietly.

signals.hook: it will summarize the meeting you were already in.
signals.line: it automated the whole meeting except the part where someone does the work.

signals.hook: your next hire does not need a desk.
signals.line: the agents are becoming staff. the winners already chose which decisions a machine gets to own.

signals.hook: you do not have an ai problem. you have a spreadsheet problem.
signals.line: the business still runs on memory, meetings, and one tired person nobody put on the org chart.
